features.name: CLI Foundation
features.description: Initialize TypeScript project, Commander command surface, shared output path, and baseline verification.
features.evidence: ./init.sh passed on 2026-05-11: npm install, npm run check, npm test, and npm run build. Built CLI smoke command returned placeholder analysis JSON.

features.name: Longbridge Data Access
features.description: Implement Longbridge CLI adapter for quote, candlesticks, and portfolio data with schema validation.
features.evidence: ./init.sh passed on 2026-05-11: Longbridge quote, candlesticks, and portfolio adapter methods parse fixture payloads with Zod schemas. Tests: 4 files / 7 tests.

features.name: Indicator System
features.description: Implement MA, MACD Histogram, RSI, ATR, Force Index, VWAP, Elder-Ray, and divergence primitives.
features.evidence: ./init.sh passed on 2026-05-11. Implemented MA, MACD, RSI, ATR, Force Index, Elder-Ray, VWAP, and divergence primitives with fixture tests.

features.name: Triple Screen And Momentum
features.description: Implement Triple Screen filters, market regime handling, and momentum score system.
features.evidence: ./init.sh passed on 2026-05-11. Implemented Triple Screen, market regime detection, and momentum scoring with system tests.

features.name: Structure And Divergence
features.description: Implement support/resistance scoring and MACD, RSI, and Force Index divergence analysis.
features.evidence: ./init.sh passed on 2026-05-11. Implemented swing/MA support-resistance and MACD/Force Index divergence signals.

features.name: Risk And Position Planning
features.description: Implement position sizing, stops, targets, risk/reward grading, and portfolio risk aggregation.
features.evidence: ./init.sh passed on 2026-05-11. Implemented 2% position sizing, stop/target engines, RR grading, and portfolio risk aggregation.

features.name: Trade Quality And Reports
features.description: Implement trade quality scoring and JSON/Markdown reports for analyze and report commands.
features.evidence: ./init.sh passed on 2026-05-11. All 6 CLI commands validated against live Longbridge data. Fixed schema mismatch, rate limiting, and option symbol handling. 6 test files / 19 tests pass.

features.name: Data Provider Abstraction
features.description: Define stable market and portfolio provider contracts so command and analysis code depend on Trade Living interfaces instead of Longbridge CLI details.
features.evidence: Implemented provider contracts, offline provider, and provider factory. CLI, quote/kline/holdings services now depend on provider interfaces instead of LongbridgeCliAdapter. Verification on 2026-05-11: npm run check, npm test (7 files / 21 tests), npm run build, and ./init.sh passed.

features.name: Longbridge SDK Or API Provider
features.description: Add a Longbridge SDK/API-backed provider implementation behind the same provider contracts, leaving Longbridge CLI as a fallback data source.
features.evidence: Installed official longbridge Node.js SDK and implemented LongbridgeSdkAdapter behind TradeLivingDataProvider. Added --data-provider sdk and --longbridge-region options, API key env support, and OAuth token cache discovery. Verification on 2026-05-11: SDK analyze NVDA.US and SDK portfolio passed against real CN Longbridge environment.

features.name: Adapter Contract Test Matrix
features.description: Add fixture-driven contract tests that lock external payload normalization into stable internal Quote, KLine, and Holding models.
features.evidence: Added fixture-driven Longbridge payload contract matrix covering quote, K-line, and holding variants plus rejection cases for missing price/timestamp/cost basis. Verification on 2026-05-11: ./init.sh passed with 9 test files / 34 tests.

features.name: AI JSON Output Contract
features.description: Document and test the stable JSON response shape intended for AI callers, including backward-compatible field evolution rules.
features.evidence: Added docs/AI_JSON_CONTRACT.md and executable Zod schemas for analyze/report and portfolio JSON outputs. Verification on 2026-05-11: contract tests passed and ./init.sh passed with 11 test files / 41 tests.

features.name: Markdown Interpretation Template
features.description: Upgrade analysis Markdown output into a reusable interpretation template with highlighted priorities, icon markers, tables, and visual price/risk sections for AI-facing reports.
features.evidence: Implemented structured analysis Markdown template with highlighted conclusion, colored signal badges, icon markers, score bars, price ladder, risk warnings, and trade plan checklist. Added markdown reporter test. Verification on 2026-05-11: ./init.sh passed with 8 test files / 22 tests.

features.name: Option Quote Provider Abstraction
features.description: Add optional external option quote providers for enriching option holdings when Longbridge OPRA access is unavailable, starting with Tradier and MarketData.app delayed-data adapters.
features.evidence: Implemented option quote provider contract, Tradier and MarketData.app adapters, auto fallback provider, optional portfolio enrichment via --option-quote-provider, and quoteSource/quoteDelay JSON fields. Verification on 2026-05-11: npm run check and npm test passed with 12 files / 48 tests.

features.name: Codex Skill For AI Invocation
features.description: Add a project-local Codex skill that guides agents through preflight validation, Longbridge environment checks, data provider selection, and AI-safe output usage before calling the CLI.
features.evidence: Added .agents/skills/trade-living-cli with SKILL.md and verify-longbridge-env.sh preflight script. Verification on 2026-05-11: skill preflight passed against real Longbridge CN environment and ./init.sh passed with 12 files / 48 tests.

features.name: Bearish Range Volatile Fixture Suites
features.description: Add deterministic bearish, range-bound, and high-volatility fixture suites to broaden regime, Triple Screen, and analysis coverage beyond bullish scenarios.
features.evidence: Added deterministic bearish, range-bound, and volatile K-line fixtures plus regime/analysis tests. Verification on 2026-05-11: ./init.sh passed with 12 files / 52 tests.

features.name: Portfolio Markdown Template
features.description: Extend the visual Markdown template approach to portfolio reports with allocation, P/L, concentration, and quote data quality sections.
features.evidence: Added structured portfolio Markdown output with overview, allocation bars, holding details, concentration warning, P/L, and quote quality sections. Verification on 2026-05-11: portfolio --markdown smoke passed and ./init.sh passed with 12 files / 52 tests.

features.name: Automated npm Release Workflow
features.description: Add GitHub Actions release automation that verifies the package and publishes to npm from semver tags using an npm automation token.
features.evidence: Added .github/workflows/npm-publish.yml with tag-triggered and manual dry-run publishing, documented NPM_TOKEN and tag release steps in README. Workflow publishes with npm publish --access public after verification. Verification on 2026-05-11: ./init.sh passed before the change; npm run check, npm test, npm run build, and npm pack --dry-run passed after the change.

features.name: Guided Init And Daemon Runtime
features.description: Add a guided init command for Longbridge installation/login checks, Telegram channel configuration, OpenAI/Codex provider status, and daemon logging, plus daemon start/status/stop support.
features.evidence: Implemented trade-living init and trade-living daemon commands with deterministic setup planning, config writing, token-safe Telegram env handling, OpenAI/Codex availability checks, and pid/log daemon runtime helpers. Verification on 2026-05-12: npm run check, npm test, npm run build, init dry-run JSON smoke, init config write smoke, and daemon status smoke passed.

features.name: Interactive Init Prompts
features.description: Upgrade trade-living init to support OpenClaw-style step-by-step prompts while keeping non-interactive JSON and yes-mode flows for AI callers.
features.evidence: Added promptInitWizardOptions with step-by-step Longbridge, Telegram, model provider, daemon, log, and config questions. CLI now prompts in TTY by default and supports --yes/--no-interactive for automation. Verification on 2026-05-12: npm run check, npm test, npm run build, init --yes JSON dry-run, init --no-interactive JSON dry-run, and ./init.sh passed.

features.name: Telegram Analysis Notifications
features.description: Allow analysis command outputs to be sent to a configured Telegram bot/channel when explicitly requested.
features.evidence: Added Telegram notification adapter, config/env resolution, output sanitization/chunking, and --notify-channel telegram CLI support. Verification on 2026-05-12: npm run check, npm test, npm run build, and CLI markdown smoke passed.

features.name: Bilingual Report Indicator Labels
features.description: Add Chinese translations in parentheses for English indicators and status labels in human-readable reports.
features.evidence: Updated Markdown reports to render English indicators/status labels with Chinese translations, including Market Regime, Triple Screen, RR, MACD, Force Index, P/L, Top allocations, support/resistance level types, quote quality, and known English warnings. Verification on 2026-05-12: npm run check, npm test, npm run build, analyze markdown smoke, and portfolio markdown smoke passed.

features.name: Munger Perspective Skill Integration
features.description: Reuse the public GitHub alchaincyf/munger-skill as a project-local skill for Charlie Munger-style investment decision review, inversion, incentive analysis, cognitive bias checks, and mental model overlays.
features.evidence: Added .agents/skills/munger-perspective from https://github.com/alchaincyf/munger-skill with SKILL.md, MIT LICENSE, references, and examples. Verification on 2026-05-15: skill frontmatter inspected and npm run check passed.

features.name: Position-Aware Stock Analysis
features.description: Query account holdings before analyze/report commands and add position-aware context when the requested symbol is already held, while keeping normal analysis unchanged for symbols without a matching holding.
features.evidence: Added optional AnalyzeResult.position context with matched holding, cost basis, unrealized P/L, portfolio weight, risk-to-stop, notes, Markdown rendering, product docs, and JSON contract coverage. Verification on 2026-05-15: ./init.sh passed, including npm run check, npm test, npm run build; CLI smokes for held/non-held symbols and Markdown report output passed.

features.name: Bilingual Status And Conclusion Interpretation
features.description: Add Chinese conclusion and status explanations to analysis JSON outputs and ensure human-readable reports include Chinese translations for trade quality and position-management notes.
features.evidence: Added optional analyze JSON interpretation with Chinese conclusion, status labels/narratives, warning translations, and position note translations. Markdown reports now render bilingual trade quality labels and translated position notes. Verification on 2026-05-16: npm run check, npm test, npm run build, ./init.sh, and JSON/Markdown CLI smokes passed.

features.name: Strict Triple Screen Timeframes And RR Report
features.description: Default live analysis history to one year back from the current date, use real weekly and monthly K-lines for strict Triple Screen analysis, and add Chinese timeframe status plus RR analysis to reports.
features.evidence: Analyze/report/triple now fetch real day/week/month K-lines; Triple Screen requires monthly and weekly trend confirmation and exposes monthlyTrend/weeklyTrend/pullback/trigger/score. Default --start is dynamically one year before runtime. Markdown reports include 三重滤网状态 and RR 分析 sections; JSON interpretation includes monthly/weekly/RR Chinese explanations. Verification on 2026-05-16: npm run check, npm test, focused systems/contract/Markdown/Longbridge adapter tests, npm run build, offline JSON/Markdown/triple smokes, and live AAPL analyze smoke passed.

features.name: Triple Screen Five-Factor Timeframe Lattice
features.description: Model Elder's five-factor timeframe rule explicitly: user-selected intermediate timeframe, long timeframe equal to roughly five times intermediate, and short timeframe equal to roughly one fifth intermediate. Expose the resolved lattice in analyze/triple/report JSON and Markdown, keep live data behind providers, and fail clearly when a provider cannot supply the requested short timeframe.
features.evidence: Gap identified on 2026-05-16 from the Elder Triple Screen technical plan: current implementation uses day/week/month for analysis, but does not yet expose a configurable intermediate/long/short timeframe lattice or short-timeframe data requirements.

features.name: Elder Impulse Market Tide Filter
features.description: Replace the current long-timeframe trend shortcut with an explicit Elder Impulse tide filter using EMA26 slope and MACD histogram slope. Return green/red/blue states with Chinese labels, allowed actions, and deterministic tests for bullish, bearish, and conflicting indicator directions.
features.evidence: Gap identified on 2026-05-16: current Triple Screen trend uses MACD histogram sign plus Force Index EMA13 sign; the Elder plan calls for EMA slope plus MACD histogram slope and explicit green/red/blue action constraints.

features.name: Intermediate Wave Pullback Filter
features.description: Formalize the second Triple Screen filter on the intermediate timeframe. Detect counter-trend wave opportunities with Force Index EMA2, RSI, and optional stochastic oversold/overbought rules; output pullback quality, rejected reasons, and Chinese explanations without creating trade orders.
features.evidence: Gap identified on 2026-05-16: current implementation checks daily RSI and Force Index EMA2, but the wave filter is not yet a first-class module with configurable oscillator rules and detailed rejection reasons.

features.name: Average EMA Penetration Entry Planner
features.description: Add advisory entry planning for Elder's Average EMA Penetration method: estimate tomorrow's EMA13, calculate the average 13EMA penetration depth over the recent 4-6 week window, and produce long/short entry zones plus the prior-high/prior-low trailing stop alternative. This must remain plan-only and must not place orders.
features.evidence: Gap identified on 2026-05-16: existing tradePlan.entryZone is a simple +/-1% band around latest close; it does not implement EMA13 projection, average penetration depth, or trailing stop entry technique.

features.name: Risk Control Gates Two And Six Percent
features.description: Extend risk planning with Elder's risk control gates: single-trade risk capped at 2% of equity and aggregate open-position risk capped at 6% of equity. Use current holdings and stop estimates where available, return block/reduce/watch states, and keep behavior advisory only.
features.evidence: Gap identified on 2026-05-16: position sizing supports a 2% input default, but analysis does not yet enforce or report a portfolio-level 6% open-risk gate before recommending new exposure.

features.name: Triple Screen Exit Strategy Planner
features.description: Add exit-planning logic for existing positions: fast impulse-color exits when the intermediate timeframe changes color, conservative channel or auto-envelope targets, and ATR +2/+3 partial-exit levels. Reports should explain hold/reduce/exit rationale in Chinese.
features.evidence: Gap identified on 2026-05-16: current reports provide targets, stops, RR, and position notes, but do not yet model Elder's impulse-color exit or auto-envelope/channel exit styles.

features.name: MACD Divergence Scanner A-B Alerts
features.description: Develop a semi-automatic scanner for MACD histogram versus price divergence, including early A-bottom and B-top style alert candidates. The scanner should rank opportunities, expose reasons in JSON/Markdown, and remain alert-only.
features.evidence: Gap identified on 2026-05-16: divergence primitives exist and analysis reports MACD/Force divergence, but there is no scanner or A/B-pattern alert workflow across symbols.

features.name: Elder Trade Sheet And Seven-Point Score Gate
features.description: Generate a structured trade sheet before any proposed trade plan, including symbol, direction, entry, stop, targets, RR, timeframe states, risk gates, and an Elder-style 0-10 score. Plans scoring below 7 should be marked as do-not-act in reports and JSON.
features.evidence: Gap identified on 2026-05-16: current tradeQuality uses a 0-100 grade system; it does not yet produce an Elder-style trade sheet or a 7/10 minimum action gate.

features.name: Impulse Visualization And Conditional Formatting
features.description: Add report/UI-ready conditional formatting for Elder Impulse colors across resolved timeframes. JSON should expose color states, Markdown should render bilingual color legends, and any future UI can consume the same fields without recalculating indicator state.
features.evidence: Gap identified on 2026-05-16: current Markdown has badges and Chinese labels, but does not expose reusable per-bar or per-timeframe impulse color states for UI visualization.
